## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / adapter
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (requires bash)
- [ ] `bash scripts/round-trip-test.sh` is green (idempotency invariant holds)
- [ ] Conventional-commit style messages
- [ ] No personal paths, tokens, or secrets in the diff
- [ ] Updated docs / `spec/SPEC.md` if behavior or the spec contract changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific you want eyes on, or deviations from the spec contract. -->
